id.description: Stable, content-derived id. Dedupes re-runs (backfill is idempotent).

at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp. Stored absolute; the dashboard renders it relative ("Today, 9:12 AM" / "Jun 10").

type.description: Drives the per-event icon + default tone.

actor.description: agent = a Rolester skill did it (gets the ✦ Rolester marker); world = something happened to the candidate (inbound mail, status change).

title.description: Bold one-liner headline. Human-facing prose — placeholder-linted, never carries a private comp input.

summary.description: Optional one-line supporting detail under the title.

refs.description: Click-through targets so the feed entry opens the right drawer / link.

tone.description: Visual tone. offer → success, rejection/failure → warning, everything else → info.

needsUser.description: true → render a quiet CTA and tie into Next Steps (the agent halted or needs a human action).

cta.description: Optional explicit call-to-action when needsUser is set (custom label + target).

detail.description: Optional richer payload surfaced in the drawer (free-form).

skill.description: The emitting skill id (e.g. "track-outcomes"). Optional, agent-actor events only. Turns the feed into a mutation audit trail; the dashboard ignores it for rendering.

operation.description: Structured resource:verb describing the change (e.g. "application:status-advance", "comm:reply-sent"). Optional. Pairs with skill so you can answer 'what did skill X change at time T' without re-reading prose.
